videos.description:
Your Jeep doesn't just fail on trail out of nowhere. It tried to tell you. Multiple times. You were just too busy planning the next trip to listen.

#JeepLife #JeepMaintenance #Overlanding #OffRoad

In this episode of 2 Dudes 1 Wrench, Paul and The Ginger go full dad mode on Jeep maintenance and give you the complete checklist that nobody handed you when you drove off the lot.

Here is the uncomfortable truth: most Jeep breakdowns on trail are not bad luck. They are deferred maintenance catching

videos.title: The Most Luxurious Off-Road Trailer I've Ever Towed
videos.description: I've had the Patriot Campers ST5 Super Tourer for a couple months now and it's time to talk about it. I've taken it solo, Regena and I did a four day trip up to Northern California, and we've really gotten to know this trailer. In this video, I take it out into the desert for one last trip before summer shuts things down, walk you through everything inside and out, and give you my honest take on what it's like to live with the most expensive off-road trailer I've ever towed. videos.title: Tundra Camping in Peaceful Appalachia
videos.description:
Ride along as the Griz steps up to lead our overland adventures following the growing list of mechanical challenges with Silver. In this episode, I head off on a (much needed) peaceful trail exploration through the scenic Appalachians.

I also give an update on the Tundra’s evolving overland kit, and share recent modifications designed for comfort and capability on these extended trips. While I truly miss travel in the Wild West, these eastern adventures offer a different pace and a distinct sen

videos.title: NEW Workflows Feature In Copilot Studio (20-Min Full Demo)
videos.description:
I just got my hands on the all new workflows designer feature for #CopilotStudio and today we are going to take a look at it together for the first time.

Workflows are ideal for when you want to orchestrate agents as part of a repeatable process. So you can do things like add variables, if/else statements and loops just like a traditional automation.

And then you can also add agentic actions like prompts and skills, and even bring a human into the loop when needed

videos.title: How to Remain Relevant in a world of AI
videos.description: In this video I walk you through my 8 key things you need to do and know to remain relevant in the world of AI.  We explore how to accelerate your value and where you will find your value when working with AI.  I give you tricks to what successful people do when working with AI as it is not about competing with AI but learning to harness its powers to make you all that you can be.

videos.title: The New Jobs AI Will Create
videos.description: The AI jobs debate has spent years asking which roles will disappear. This weekend long-read asks the more important question: what becomes possible when AI expands the amount of useful work the economy can support? NLW lays out a first-principles case for why better AI does not simply mean less human work, exploring how cheaper services, broader access, continuous support, personalization, and human trust can create new demand. From there, he introduces the “human premium” that remains even as
